title: Makrut Mint Bliss
description: A floral, juicy Greek dish featuring makrut lime leaves that adds a burst of freshness and flavor for post-workout recovery.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add finely chopped onion and minced garlic, sauté until translucent.
Fold in sliced zucchini and optional diced bell pepper. Mix well to combine.
Pour low-sodium chicken broth into the pan along with lemon juice. Stir to combine all ingredients evenly.
Cover and simmer for 5-7 minutes or until zucchini is tender but still has a bit of crunch.
Remove from heat, add chopped mint leaves and basil leaves. Toss gently to incorporate.
Serve immediately as a low-sodium friendly snack with extra lemon zest for garnish.
